mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO conversation_retrieval_task ( conversation_retrieval_id, task_type, query_text, status, error_message, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{item.conversationRetrievalId}, #{item.taskType}, #{item.queryText}, #{item.status}, #{item.errorMessage}, #{item.startedAt}, #{item.finishedAt}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt} )
